full_content:
{
  "id": "DCL-OLLAMA-ROUTING-CONFIG-SCHEMA-001",
  "type": "design_constraint",
  "status": "specified",
  "title": ".ollama/routing.toml schema constraint",
  "scope": "GT-KB Ollama harness static routing configuration. Affected by ADR-OLLAMA-HARNESS-ADOPTION-001.",
  "tags": ["design-constraint", "ollama", "routing", "schema", "phase-1"],
  "description": "Constraint: Every .ollama/routing.toml MUST conform to the following schema --

  schema_version = 1            # integer, required
  [models.<key>]               # at least one models table required
  model_id = "<provider:model-tag>"
  context_window = <int>        # optional in Phase 1
  tool_calling_supported = <bool>
  allowed_tools = [<tool>, ...] # subset of ("Read","Write","Edit","Grep","Glob","Bash")
  [routing]
  default_model = "<models-key>"
  [routing.skills]             # optional in Phase 1

Severity: blocking. A non-conformant routing.toml MUST fail the dispatch-time schema check and the doctor advertised-models sub-check.

Enforcement: scripts/ollama_harness.py::load_routing_config() raises ValueError on schema violations; doctor _check_ollama_harness re-validates registry/config consistency.

Affected by: ADR-OLLAMA-HARNESS-ADOPTION-001. Owner decision anchor: DELIB-20260663 AUQ#2 (static .ollama/routing.toml).",
  "assertions": [
    {"type": "grep", "file": ".ollama/routing.toml", "pattern": "schema_version = 1", "description": "Routing config declares schema_version = 1."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": ".ollama/routing.toml", "pattern": "default_model", "description": "Routing config declares a default_model under [routing]."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": ".ollama/routing.toml", "pattern": "model_id", "description": "Routing config declares at least one models table with model_id."},
    {"type": "grep", "file": "scripts/ollama_harness.py", "pattern": "load_routing_config", "description": "Shim defines load_routing_config that validates the schema."}
  ]
}
